hooks.command: sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks factoryai-droid post-tool-use'
sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks factoryai-droid pre-compact'
sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks factoryai-droid pre-tool-use'
sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks factoryai-droid session-end'
sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks factoryai-droid session-start'
sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks factoryai-droid user-prompt-submit'

sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf "%s\n" "Entire CLI is enabled but not installed or not on PATH. Installation guide: https://docs.entire.io/cli/installation#installation-methods"; exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks factoryai-droid stop'
sh -c 'if ! command -v entire >/dev/null 2>&1; then exit 0; fi; exec entire hooks factoryai-droid user-prompt-submit'
